channel.title: Check on FsFlow
channel.description: Recent content in Check on FsFlow

item.title: Check
item.description:
Pure validation helpers. Unprefixed names are predicates, when* names preserve the original input on success, and take* names extract or narrow the successful value.

Signature

type Check

item.title: CardinalityFailure
item.description:
Structured errors returned by sequence cardinality helpers.

Signature

type CardinalityFailure

Union Cases

Case Description
ExpectedSingle The sequence was expected to contain exactly one item.
ExpectedAtMostOne The sequence was expected to contain at most one item.
ExpectedAtLeastOne The sequence was expected to contain at least one item.
ExpectedMoreThanOne The sequence was expected to contain more than one item.

item.title: StringLengthFailure
item.description:
Structured errors returned by string length helpers.

Signature

type StringLengthFailure

Union Cases

Case Description
ExpectedMinLength The string was shorter than the minimum length.
ExpectedMaxLength The string was longer than the maximum length.
ExpectedExactLength The string length did not match the expected length.

item.title: RangeFailure
item.description:
Structured errors returned by comparison and numeric helpers.

Signature

type RangeFailure<'value>

Type Parameters

Name
value

Union Cases

Case Description
ExpectedGreaterThan The value was expected to be greater than the supplied lower bound.
ExpectedLessThan The value was expected to be less than the supplied upper bound.
ExpectedAtLeast The value was expected to be greater than or equal to the supplied lower bound.
ExpectedAtMost The value was expected to be less than or equal to the supplied upper bound.
ExpectedBetween The value was expected to be between the supplied inclusive bounds.

item.title: Check.fromPredicate
item.description:
Builds a check from a predicate while preserving the successful value.

Signature

Check.fromPredicate predicate value

Parameters

Name Type Description
predicate ‘value -> bool The predicate to evaluate.
value ‘value The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘value> Ok value when the predicate returns true; otherwise Error ().

Examples

 5 |> Check.fromPredicate (fun x -> x > 0) // Ok 5
 -1 |> Check.fromPredicate (fun x -> x > 0) // Error ()

item.title: Check.fromTry
item.description:
Converts a .NET Try* tuple into a check result.

Signature

Check.fromTry (arg1, arg1)

Parameters

Name Type Description
arg0 bool
arg1 ‘value

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘value> Ok value when the flag is true; otherwise Error ().

Examples

 System.Int32.TryParse "42" |> Check.fromTry // Ok 42
 System.Int32.TryParse "x" |> Check.fromTry // Error ()
namespace System
type Int32 = member CompareTo: value: int -> int + 1 overload member Equals: obj: int -> bool + 1 overload member GetHashCode: unit -> int member GetTypeCode: unit -> TypeCode member ToString: unit -> string + 3 overloads member TryFormat: utf8Destination: Span<byte> * bytesWritten: byref<int> * ?format: ReadOnlySpan<char> * ?provider: IFormatProvider -> bool + 1 overload static member Abs: value: int -> int static member BigMul: left: int * right: int -> int64 static member Clamp: value: int * min: int * max: int -> int static member CopySign: value: int * sign: int -> int ...
<summary>Represents a 32-bit signed integer.</summary>
System.Int32.TryParse( s: string, result: byref<int>) : bool
System.Int32.TryParse(s: System.ReadOnlySpan<char>, result: byref<int>) : bool
System.Int32.TryParse(utf8Text: System.ReadOnlySpan<byte>, result: byref<int>) : bool
System.Int32.TryParse( s: string, provider: System.IFormatProvider, result: byref<int>) : bool
System.Int32.TryParse(s: System.ReadOnlySpan<char>, provider: System.IFormatProvider, result: byref<int>) : bool
System.Int32.TryParse(utf8Text: System.ReadOnlySpan<byte>, provider: System.IFormatProvider, result: byref<int>) : bool
System.Int32.TryParse( s: string, style: System.Globalization.NumberStyles, provider: System.IFormatProvider, result: byref<int>) : bool
System.Int32.TryParse(s: System.ReadOnlySpan<char>, style: System.Globalization.NumberStyles, provider: System.IFormatProvider, result: byref<int>) : bool
System.Int32.TryParse(utf8Text: System.ReadOnlySpan<byte>, style: System.Globalization.NumberStyles, provider: System.IFormatProvider, result: byref<int>) : bool

item.title: Check.fromChoice
item.description:
Converts an F# Choice into a Result.

Signature

Check.fromChoice choice

Parameters

Name Type Description
choice Choice<‘value, ’error> The choice value to convert.

Returns

Type Description
Result<‘value, ’error> Ok for Choice1Of2; Error for Choice2Of2.

Examples

 Choice1Of2 42 |> Check.fromChoice // Ok 42
 Choice2Of2 "missing" |> Check.fromChoice // Error "missing"
union case Choice.Choice1Of2: 'T1 -> Choice<'T1,'T2>
union case Choice.Choice2Of2: 'T2 -> Choice<'T1,'T2>

item.title: Check.negate
item.description:
Returns success when the supplied check fails.

Signature

Check.negate check

Parameters

Name Type Description
check Check<‘value> The source check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> A unit-success check with inverted success/failure.

Examples

 Check.isTrue true |> Check.negate // Error ()
 Check.isTrue false |> Check.negate // Ok ()

item.title: Check.both
item.description:
Returns success when both checks succeed.

Signature

Check.both left right

Parameters

Name Type Description
left Check<’left> The first check.
right Check<‘right> The second check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> A unit-success check that short-circuits on the first failure.

item.title: Check.either
item.description:
Returns success when either check succeeds.

Signature

Check.either left right

Parameters

Name Type Description
left Check<’left> The first check.
right Check<‘right> The second check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> A unit-success check that short-circuits on the first success.

item.title: Check.all
item.description:
Returns success when every check in the sequence succeeds.

Signature

Check.all checks

Parameters

Name Type Description
checks Check<‘value> seq The checks to evaluate.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> A unit-success check that short-circuits on the first failure.

item.title: Check.any
item.description:
Returns success when at least one check in the sequence succeeds.

Signature

Check.any checks

Parameters

Name Type Description
checks Check<‘value> seq The checks to evaluate.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> A unit-success check that short-circuits on the first success.

item.title: Check.isTrue
item.description:
Returns success when the condition is true.

Signature

Check.isTrue condition

Parameters

Name Type Description
condition bool The boolean condition to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () when true; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.isFalse
item.description:
Returns success when the condition is false.

Signature

Check.isFalse condition

Parameters

Name Type Description
condition bool The boolean condition to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () when false; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.isSome
item.description:
Returns success when the option is Some.

Signature

Check.isSome value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value ‘value option The option to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () for Some; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.isNone
item.description:
Returns success when the option is None.

Signature

Check.isNone value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value ‘value option The option to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () for None; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.isValueSome
item.description:
Returns success when the value option is ValueSome.

Signature

Check.isValueSome value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value ‘value voption The value option to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () for ValueSome; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.isValueNone
item.description:
Returns success when the value option is ValueNone.

Signature

Check.isValueNone value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value ‘value voption The value option to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () for ValueNone; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.isOk
item.description:
Returns success when the result is Ok.

Signature

Check.isOk result

Parameters

Name Type Description
result Result<‘value, ’error> The result to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () when the result is Ok; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.isError
item.description:
Returns success when the result is Error.

Signature

Check.isError result

Parameters

Name Type Description
result Result<‘value, ’error> The result to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () when the result is Error; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.hasValue
item.description:
Returns success when the nullable has a value.

Signature

Check.hasValue value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value Nullable<‘value> The nullable value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () when HasValue is true; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.hasNoValue
item.description:
Returns success when the nullable has no value.

Signature

Check.hasNoValue value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value Nullable<‘value> The nullable value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () when HasValue is false; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.notNull
item.description:
Returns success when the reference is not null.

Signature

Check.notNull value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value ‘value The reference value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () for non-null values; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.isNull
item.description:
Returns success when the reference is null.

Signature

Check.isNull value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value ‘value The reference value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () for null values; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.notEmpty
item.description:
Returns success when the sequence is not empty.

Signature

Check.notEmpty values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘value seq The sequence to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () for non-empty sequences; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.empty
item.description:
Returns success when the sequence is empty.

Signature

Check.empty values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘value seq The sequence to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () for empty sequences; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.notNullOrEmpty
item.description:
Returns success when the string is not null or empty.

Signature

Check.notNullOrEmpty value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () for non-empty strings; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.nullOrEmpty
item.description:
Returns success when the string is null or empty.

Signature

Check.nullOrEmpty value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () for null or empty strings; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.notEmptyString
item.description:
Returns success when the string has length greater than zero.

Signature

Check.notEmptyString value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () for non-null strings with length greater than zero; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.emptyString
item.description:
Returns success when the string is exactly empty, not null.

Signature

Check.emptyString value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () for ""; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.notBlank
item.description:
Returns success when the string is not blank.

Signature

Check.notBlank value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () for non-blank strings; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.blank
item.description:
Returns success when the string is blank.

Signature

Check.blank value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () for null, empty, or whitespace strings; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.minLength
item.description:
Returns success when the string length is at least the supplied minimum.

Signature

Check.minLength minimum value

Parameters

Name Type Description
minimum int The minimum accepted length.
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<unit, StringLengthFailure> Ok () when the length is high enough; otherwise a length failure.

item.title: Check.maxLength
item.description:
Returns success when the string length is at most the supplied maximum.

Signature

Check.maxLength maximum value

Parameters

Name Type Description
maximum int The maximum accepted length.
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<unit, StringLengthFailure> Ok () when the length is low enough; otherwise a length failure.

item.title: Check.exactLength
item.description:
Returns success when the string length equals the supplied length.

Signature

Check.exactLength expected value

Parameters

Name Type Description
expected int The expected length.
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<unit, StringLengthFailure> Ok () when the length matches; otherwise a length failure.

item.title: Check.matchesRegex
item.description:
Returns success when the string matches the supplied regular expression pattern.

Signature

Check.matchesRegex pattern value

Parameters

Name Type Description
pattern string The regular expression pattern.
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () when the string matches; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.contains
item.description:
Returns success when the sequence contains the expected value.

Signature

Check.contains expected values

Parameters

Name Type Description
expected ‘value The value to search for.
values ‘value seq The sequence to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () when the value is present; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.hasCount
item.description:
Returns success when the sequence count equals the expected count.

Signature

Check.hasCount expected values

Parameters

Name Type Description
expected int The expected item count.
values ‘value seq The sequence to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () when the count matches; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.hasDuplicates
item.description:
Returns success when the sequence contains duplicate values.

Signature

Check.hasDuplicates values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘value seq The sequence to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () when a duplicate is found; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.hasNoDuplicates
item.description:
Returns success when the sequence contains no duplicate values.

Signature

Check.hasNoDuplicates values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘value seq The sequence to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () when all values are unique; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.isSingle
item.description:
Returns success when the sequence contains exactly one item.

Signature

Check.isSingle values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘value seq The sequence to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<unit, CardinalityFailure> Ok () when exactly one item is present; otherwise a cardinality failure.

item.title: Check.atMostOne
item.description:
Returns success when the sequence contains at most one item.

Signature

Check.atMostOne values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘value seq The sequence to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<unit, CardinalityFailure> Ok () when zero or one item is present; otherwise a cardinality failure.

item.title: Check.atLeastOne
item.description:
Returns success when the sequence contains at least one item.

Signature

Check.atLeastOne values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘value seq The sequence to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<unit, CardinalityFailure> Ok () when one or more items are present; otherwise a cardinality failure.

item.title: Check.moreThanOne
item.description:
Returns success when the sequence contains more than one item.

Signature

Check.moreThanOne values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘value seq The sequence to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<unit, CardinalityFailure> Ok () when more than one item is present; otherwise a cardinality failure.

item.title: Check.equalTo
item.description:
Returns success when the actual value equals the expected value.

Signature

Check.equalTo expected actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
expected ‘value The expected value.
actual ‘value The actual value.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () when equal; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.notEqualTo
item.description:
Returns success when the actual value does not equal the expected value.

Signature

Check.notEqualTo expected actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
expected ‘value The value that should not match.
actual ‘value The actual value.

Returns

Type Description
Check<unit> Ok () when values differ; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.greaterThan
item.description:
Returns success when the actual value is greater than the supplied bound.

Signature

Check.greaterThan minimum actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
minimum ‘a The exclusive lower bound.
actual ‘a The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<unit, RangeFailure<‘a>> Ok () when the value is greater; otherwise a range failure.

item.title: Check.lessThan
item.description:
Returns success when the actual value is less than the supplied bound.

Signature

Check.lessThan maximum actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
maximum ‘a The exclusive upper bound.
actual ‘a The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<unit, RangeFailure<‘a>> Ok () when the value is less; otherwise a range failure.

item.title: Check.atLeast
item.description:
Returns success when the actual value is greater than or equal to the supplied bound.

Signature

Check.atLeast minimum actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
minimum ‘a The inclusive lower bound.
actual ‘a The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<unit, RangeFailure<‘a>> Ok () when the value is at least the bound; otherwise a range failure.

item.title: Check.atMost
item.description:
Returns success when the actual value is less than or equal to the supplied bound.

Signature

Check.atMost maximum actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
maximum ‘a The inclusive upper bound.
actual ‘a The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<unit, RangeFailure<‘a>> Ok () when the value is at most the bound; otherwise a range failure.

item.title: Check.between
item.description:
Returns success when the actual value is between the inclusive bounds.

Signature

Check.between minimum maximum actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
minimum ‘a The inclusive lower bound.
maximum ‘a The inclusive upper bound.
actual ‘a The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<unit, RangeFailure<‘a>> Ok () when the value is in range; otherwise a range failure.

item.title: Check.positive
item.description:
Returns success when the numeric value is greater than zero.

Signature

Check.positive actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
actual ^a The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<unit, RangeFailure<^a>> Ok () when the value is positive; otherwise a range failure.

item.title: Check.nonNegative
item.description:
Returns success when the numeric value is greater than or equal to zero.

Signature

Check.nonNegative actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
actual ^a The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<unit, RangeFailure<^a>> Ok () when the value is non-negative; otherwise a range failure.

item.title: Check.negative
item.description:
Returns success when the numeric value is less than zero.

Signature

Check.negative actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
actual ^a The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<unit, RangeFailure<^a>> Ok () when the value is negative; otherwise a range failure.

item.title: Check.nonPositive
item.description:
Returns success when the numeric value is less than or equal to zero.

Signature

Check.nonPositive actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
actual ^a The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<unit, RangeFailure<^a>> Ok () when the value is non-positive; otherwise a range failure.

item.title: Check.whenTrue
item.description:
Keeps the boolean when it is true.

Signature

Check.whenTrue condition

Parameters

Name Type Description
condition bool The boolean condition to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<bool> Ok true when true; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenFalse
item.description:
Keeps the boolean when it is false.

Signature

Check.whenFalse condition

Parameters

Name Type Description
condition bool The boolean condition to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<bool> Ok false when false; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenSome
item.description:
Keeps the option when it is Some.

Signature

Check.whenSome value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value ‘value option The option to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘value option> Ok option for Some; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenNone
item.description:
Keeps the option when it is None.

Signature

Check.whenNone value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value ‘value option The option to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘value option> Ok None for None; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenValueSome
item.description:
Keeps the value option when it is ValueSome.

Signature

Check.whenValueSome value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value ‘value voption The value option to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘value voption> Ok valueOption for ValueSome; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenValueNone
item.description:
Keeps the value option when it is ValueNone.

Signature

Check.whenValueNone value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value ‘value voption The value option to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘value voption> Ok ValueNone for ValueNone; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenHasValue
item.description:
Keeps the nullable when it has a value.

Signature

Check.whenHasValue value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value Nullable<‘value> The nullable value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<Nullable<‘value>> Ok nullable when HasValue is true; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenHasNoValue
item.description:
Keeps the nullable when it has no value.

Signature

Check.whenHasNoValue value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value Nullable<‘value> The nullable value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<Nullable<‘value>> Ok nullable when HasValue is false; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenNotNull
item.description:
Keeps the reference when it is not null.

Signature

Check.whenNotNull value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value ‘value The reference value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘value> Ok value when non-null; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenNull
item.description:
Keeps the reference when it is null.

Signature

Check.whenNull value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value ‘value The reference value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘value> Ok null when null; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenOk
item.description:
Keeps the result when it is Ok.

Signature

Check.whenOk result

Parameters

Name Type Description
result Result<‘value, ’error> The result to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<Result<‘value, ’error>> Ok result when the result is Ok; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenError
item.description:
Keeps the result when it is Error.

Signature

Check.whenError result

Parameters

Name Type Description
result Result<‘value, ’error> The result to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<Result<‘value, ’error>> Ok result when the result is Error; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenNotEmpty
item.description:
Keeps the collection when it is not empty.

Signature

Check.whenNotEmpty values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘collection The collection to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘collection> Ok values for non-empty collections; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenEmpty
item.description:
Keeps the collection when it is empty.

Signature

Check.whenEmpty values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘collection The collection to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘collection> Ok values for empty collections; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenNotNullOrEmpty
item.description:
Keeps the string when it is not null or empty.

Signature

Check.whenNotNullOrEmpty value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<string> Ok value for non-empty strings; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenNullOrEmpty
item.description:
Keeps the string when it is null or empty.

Signature

Check.whenNullOrEmpty value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<string> Ok value for null or empty strings; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenNotEmptyString
item.description:
Keeps the string when it has length greater than zero.

Signature

Check.whenNotEmptyString value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<string> Ok value for non-null strings with length greater than zero; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenEmptyString
item.description:
Keeps the string when it is exactly empty, not null.

Signature

Check.whenEmptyString value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<string> Ok value for ""; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenNotBlank
item.description:
Keeps the string when it is not blank.

Signature

Check.whenNotBlank value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<string> Ok value for non-blank strings; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenBlank
item.description:
Keeps the string when it is blank.

Signature

Check.whenBlank value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<string> Ok value for null, empty, or whitespace strings; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenMinLength
item.description:
Keeps the string when its length is at least the supplied minimum.

Signature

Check.whenMinLength minimum value

Parameters

Name Type Description
minimum int The minimum accepted length.
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<string, StringLengthFailure> Ok value when the length is high enough; otherwise a length failure.

item.title: Check.whenMaxLength
item.description:
Keeps the string when its length is at most the supplied maximum.

Signature

Check.whenMaxLength maximum value

Parameters

Name Type Description
maximum int The maximum accepted length.
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<string, StringLengthFailure> Ok value when the length is low enough; otherwise a length failure.

item.title: Check.whenExactLength
item.description:
Keeps the string when its length equals the supplied length.

Signature

Check.whenExactLength expected value

Parameters

Name Type Description
expected int The expected length.
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<string, StringLengthFailure> Ok value when the length matches; otherwise a length failure.

item.title: Check.whenMatchesRegex
item.description:
Keeps the string when it matches the supplied regular expression pattern.

Signature

Check.whenMatchesRegex pattern value

Parameters

Name Type Description
pattern string The regular expression pattern.
value string The string to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<string> Ok value when the string matches; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenEqualTo
item.description:
Keeps the actual value when it equals the expected value.

Signature

Check.whenEqualTo expected actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
expected ‘value The expected value.
actual ‘value The actual value.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘value> Ok actual when equal; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenNotEqualTo
item.description:
Keeps the actual value when it does not equal the expected value.

Signature

Check.whenNotEqualTo expected actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
expected ‘value The value that should not match.
actual ‘value The actual value.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘value> Ok actual when values differ; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenContains
item.description:
Keeps the collection when it contains the expected value.

Signature

Check.whenContains expected values

Parameters

Name Type Description
expected ‘value The value to search for.
values ‘collection The collection to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘collection> Ok values when the value is present; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenCount
item.description:
Keeps the collection when its count equals the expected count.

Signature

Check.whenCount expected values

Parameters

Name Type Description
expected int The expected item count.
values ‘collection The collection to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘collection> Ok values when the count matches; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenHasDuplicates
item.description:
Keeps the collection when it contains duplicate values.

Signature

Check.whenHasDuplicates values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘collection The collection to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘collection> Ok values when a duplicate is found; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenHasNoDuplicates
item.description:
Keeps the collection when it contains no duplicate values.

Signature

Check.whenHasNoDuplicates values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘collection The collection to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘collection> Ok values when all values are unique; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.whenSingle
item.description:
Keeps the collection when it contains exactly one item.

Signature

Check.whenSingle values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘collection The collection to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<‘collection, CardinalityFailure> Ok values when exactly one item is present; otherwise a cardinality failure.

item.title: Check.whenAtMostOne
item.description:
Keeps the collection when it contains at most one item.

Signature

Check.whenAtMostOne values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘collection The collection to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<‘collection, CardinalityFailure> Ok values when zero or one item is present; otherwise a cardinality failure.

item.title: Check.whenAtLeastOne
item.description:
Keeps the collection when it contains at least one item.

Signature

Check.whenAtLeastOne values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘collection The collection to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<‘collection, CardinalityFailure> Ok values when one or more items are present; otherwise a cardinality failure.

item.title: Check.whenMoreThanOne
item.description:
Keeps the collection when it contains more than one item.

Signature

Check.whenMoreThanOne values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘collection The collection to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<‘collection, CardinalityFailure> Ok values when more than one item is present; otherwise a cardinality failure.

item.title: Check.whenGreaterThan
item.description:
Keeps the value when it is greater than the supplied bound.

Signature

Check.whenGreaterThan minimum actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
minimum ‘a The exclusive lower bound.
actual ‘a The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<‘a, RangeFailure<‘a>> Ok actual when the value is greater; otherwise a range failure.

item.title: Check.whenLessThan
item.description:
Keeps the value when it is less than the supplied bound.

Signature

Check.whenLessThan maximum actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
maximum ‘a The exclusive upper bound.
actual ‘a The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<‘a, RangeFailure<‘a>> Ok actual when the value is less; otherwise a range failure.

item.title: Check.whenAtLeast
item.description:
Keeps the value when it is greater than or equal to the supplied bound.

Signature

Check.whenAtLeast minimum actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
minimum ‘a The inclusive lower bound.
actual ‘a The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<‘a, RangeFailure<‘a>> Ok actual when the value is at least the bound; otherwise a range failure.

item.title: Check.whenAtMost
item.description:
Keeps the value when it is less than or equal to the supplied bound.

Signature

Check.whenAtMost maximum actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
maximum ‘a The inclusive upper bound.
actual ‘a The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<‘a, RangeFailure<‘a>> Ok actual when the value is at most the bound; otherwise a range failure.

item.title: Check.whenBetween
item.description:
Keeps the value when it is between the inclusive bounds.

Signature

Check.whenBetween minimum maximum actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
minimum ‘a The inclusive lower bound.
maximum ‘a The inclusive upper bound.
actual ‘a The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<‘a, RangeFailure<‘a>> Ok actual when the value is in range; otherwise a range failure.

item.title: Check.whenPositive
item.description:
Keeps the numeric value when it is greater than zero.

Signature

Check.whenPositive actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
actual ^a The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<^a, RangeFailure<^a>> Ok actual when the value is positive; otherwise a range failure.

item.title: Check.whenNonNegative
item.description:
Keeps the numeric value when it is greater than or equal to zero.

Signature

Check.whenNonNegative actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
actual ^a The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<^a, RangeFailure<^a>> Ok actual when the value is non-negative; otherwise a range failure.

item.title: Check.whenNegative
item.description:
Keeps the numeric value when it is less than zero.

Signature

Check.whenNegative actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
actual ^a The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<^a, RangeFailure<^a>> Ok actual when the value is negative; otherwise a range failure.

item.title: Check.whenNonPositive
item.description:
Keeps the numeric value when it is less than or equal to zero.

Signature

Check.whenNonPositive actual

Parameters

Name Type Description
actual ^a The value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<^a, RangeFailure<^a>> Ok actual when the value is non-positive; otherwise a range failure.

item.title: Check.takeSome
item.description:
Takes the value from an option when it is Some.

Signature

Check.takeSome value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value ‘value option The option to unwrap.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘value> Ok value for Some value; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.takeValueSome
item.description:
Takes the value from a value option when it is ValueSome.

Signature

Check.takeValueSome value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value ‘value voption The value option to unwrap.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘value> Ok value for ValueSome value; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.takeHasValue
item.description:
Takes the value from a nullable when it has a value.

Signature

Check.takeHasValue value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value Nullable<‘value> The nullable value to unwrap.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘value> Ok value when HasValue is true; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.takeNotNull
item.description:
Takes the reference when it is not null.

Signature

Check.takeNotNull value

Parameters

Name Type Description
value ‘value The reference value to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘value> Ok value when non-null; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.takeOk
item.description:
Takes the successful value from a result when it is Ok.

Signature

Check.takeOk result

Parameters

Name Type Description
result Result<‘value, ’error> The result to unwrap.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘value> Ok value when the result is Ok value; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.takeError
item.description:
Takes the error value from a result when it is Error.

Signature

Check.takeError result

Parameters

Name Type Description
result Result<‘value, ’error> The result to unwrap.

Returns

Type Description
Check<’error> Ok error when the result is Error error; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.takeHead
item.description:
Takes the first item from a sequence when it is not empty.

Signature

Check.takeHead values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘value seq The sequence to check.

Returns

Type Description
Check<‘value> Ok value for the first item; otherwise Error ().

item.title: Check.takeSingle
item.description:
Takes the only item from a sequence when it contains exactly one item.

Signature

Check.takeSingle values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘value seq The sequence to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<‘value, CardinalityFailure> Ok value when exactly one item is present; otherwise a cardinality failure.

item.title: Check.takeAtMostOne
item.description:
Takes zero or one item from a sequence when it contains at most one item.

Signature

Check.takeAtMostOne values

Parameters

Name Type Description
values ‘value seq The sequence to check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<‘value option, CardinalityFailure> Ok None for empty, Ok (Some value) for one item, or a cardinality failure.

item.title: Check.withError
item.description:
Assigns the supplied application error to a unit-error check failure.

Signature

Check.withError error result

Parameters

Name Type Description
error ‘error The domain error to return when the check fails.
result Check<‘value> The source unit-error check.

Returns

Type Description
Result<‘value, ’error> The successful check value, or the supplied error when the check fails.

Examples

 "" |> Check.notBlank |> Check.withError "Name required" // Error "Name required"
 "Ada" |> Check.notBlank |> Check.withError "Name required" // Ok ()
